refnamediv.refpurpose: Compute fitted value implied by panel estimation

listitem.para: * res = tlist result of estimation (poolded, fixed effect or random effect estimation)

* paneldb = tlist containing data in panel format (use of tlist as imput it allow the user to make out-of-sample forecasts by mean of a database with different time span, cf. paneldb.sci for construction of panel tlist)

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Computes fitted values implied by panel estimation.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
